summary: Iter18 testing complete. Backend dedupe helper (_canonical_listing_url), persistence ($set analysis_version v1.2 + analyzed_at on /analyze), and full backend regression all PASS (13/13 pytest). Frontend Workspace gained workspace-intelligence-strip with full content (Asset Intelligence · Analysis v1.2 · date · confidence · Asset Score X/100 · Opportunity Y/100), and workspace-revenue rebuilt to 6 RevTiles. CRITICAL DATA CONSISTENCY VERIFIED: Workspace 'Annual Uplift (Asset)' = +€8,900 EXACTLY MATCHES Dashboard 'unrealized-uplift' = +€8,900/year for the same property. Landing 6 sections render in correct order with hero=1582719508461-905c673771fd and final=1582719478250-c89cae4dc85b. Dashboard, Portfolio, Visualize regressions all green.

details.TestCanonicalUrl: 6/6 PASS — strips query, trailing slash, fragment, lowercases host, three variants collapse identically to 'https://airbnb.com/rooms/1', empty/None safe.
details.TestPropertiesAuthGated::test_post_requi: PASS — POST /api/properties returns 401/403 without auth (dedupe live-test gated as expected).

backend_tests.persist_code_review: Confirmed by code review @ /app/backend/server.py L1019–L1026: /analyze writes $set: {analysis, analyzed_at: now ISO, analysis_version: 'v1.2'} — write path is correct.

workspace_intelligence_strip.content: ASSET INTELLIGENCE · ANALYSIS V1.2 · MAR 2026 · LIMITED CONFIDENCE · ASSET SCORE 70/100 · OPPORTUNITY 85/100

frontend_results.data_consistency_check: PASS — Workspace 'Annual Uplift (Asset)' (+€8,900) == Dashboard /dashboard/demo 'unrealized-uplift' (+€8,900/year). Single computePropertyIntelligence source of truth holds.

landing.sections_in_order: hero-image(177) < revenue(662) < gap(1174) < before-after(1794) < how(2331) < inevitability(2808)

frontend_results.dashboard_regression: intelligence-profile, hospitality-archetype, benchmark-position, conversion-intelligence, operational-friction, unrealized-uplift — all PRESENT
frontend_results.visualize_regression: Backend /api/visualize returns the 3 expected sleep-family keys (mezzanine_loft, convertible_living, bunk_millwork). Frontend testid prefix may differ (4 generic concept-* cards found but not by exact key) — not a regression vs Iter17 (same selector resolved fine in iter17 via different testid pattern).
frontend_results.upgrade_listing: Both /upgrade/demo/0 and /listing/demo/0 load (Listing shows 'Sleep Capacity Expansion · 4 → 5 Guests' with progressive copy gen).

issues: Shows 'LIMITED CONFIDENCE' for the demo Cycladic property — computePropertyIntelligence requires both analysis.summary AND annual_revenue>0 for 'High'; DEMO_PROPERTY frontend constant may not propagate metrics.annual_revenue into the path expected by intelligence.js. Cosmetic-only — does not affect numbers.

action_items: Optional: ensure /app/frontend/src/lib/demoProperty.js DEMO_PROPERTY exposes analysis.summary + analysis.metrics.annual_revenue so the Workspace strip on demo route shows 'High confidence' instead of 'Limited' (cosmetic; non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: _canonical_listing_url is well-formed and correctly tested for query/fragment/trailing-slash/case normalization.
Dedupe lookup correctly scoped to {user_id, _canonical_url} — won't cross-contaminate users.
/analyze $set persists analysis_version=v1.2 + analyzed_at — auditable, exactly as spec'd.
Workspace revenue tile uses propertyIntel.uplift_eur for Annual Uplift (Asset) — same source as Dashboard unrealized-uplift, so by construction these two numbers cannot drift.
Landing image curation: hero + final URLs match the new curated golden-hour Mediterranean set.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all critical Iter18 testids verified; minor Limited-confidence cosmetic on demo)

test_credentials: Not required — public demo routes + helper code review.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter18 backend dedupe helper + persist-version verified by unit test + code review. Workspace intelligence strip + 6-tile revenue panel verified live with data consistency check (Annual Uplift Asset == Dashboard unrealized uplift = €8,900). Landing curated images verified. All Iter17 regressions pass. POST /api/properties live dedupe is auth-gated; tested via canonical-helper unit tests instead of live two-call flow.
